tag.v: Operates as Runway 18R/36L during EAA AirVenture
Operates only during the annual EAA fly-in
Ultralight runway only operates during EAA AirVenture
Operates as Runway 18L/36R during EAA AirVenture and as part of taxiway A during the rest of the year
City of Oshkosh has annexed significant area since data import, needs update
Some of the boundaries between Wittman and Pioneer/EAA weren't very clear, so they may need to be fixed there.
EAA Membership and/or Museum Admission Required
